title: Peruvian's Delight
description: A Farmer's Delight addon that adds a few of Peruvian culture.
body:
![FullLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ad311e2d1bddcd8df771ca6f8c0e1806934b689.png)
## **Dependencies**
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
## **About the Mod**
Peruvian's Delight is an add-on for the Farmer's Delight mod. It adds a new mob, crops, foods, trees, recipes, wood and blocks (with much more to come). All of these are related to Peruvian culture. The most iconic Peruvian dishes have been added, alongside realistic crafting that stays true to the essence of Minecraft.
